The '''C-16 fragmentation grenade''' was a model of [[Fragmentation grenade/Legends|fragmentation grenade]] manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] The [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] contained a [[Detonite/Legends|detonite]] core surrounded by a prestressed [[chrome]] shell. When detonated, the C-16 sent out a flurry of shrapnel into the target area.<ref name="AE" /> The C-16 had a low mass, and incorporated a [[Detonator/Legends|detonator]] switch with a present delay of four [[Standard second|seconds]]. The [[timer]] could be altered by twisting a dial.<ref name="EGWT" /> The C-16 was popular with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="AE" /> as well as [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] troops.<ref name="EGWT" />

*''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]''
